headline: OBX leads by 343bp as Energy and Industrials dominate
market_take: OBX outperforms OSEBX by 343bp, with large-cap concentration driving the spread in a rotation regime. Breadth sits at 64%, above the 70% threshold, indicating moderately broad participation rather than narrow leadership. Capital has rotated into Energy and Industrials while Health Care and Real Estate lag with negative year-to-date returns.

drivers.claim: Top-ranked Energy name; momentum and alpha both near-perfect scores.
Himalaya Shipping leads Industrials with the highest risk-adjusted return.
Subsea 7 sits in leadership despite appearing simultaneously in risks.
Smartoptics carries the highest alpha in the brief; momentum is perfect.

risks.claim: Kitron is stretched; mean reversion gap of 174% at 90th-percentile volatility.
Kongsberg extended 141% above reversion with compressed momentum.
Subsea 7's 114% overextension flag crowds its quality leadership story.
BW Energy stretched 89% above reversion at 83rd-percentile volatility.

watchlist.claim: Near-buy held back by mean reversion gate; earnings yield remains attractive.
Stolt-Nielsen near-buy blocked by mean reversion; return is negative YTD.
